data.name: 遠星都市27λ
data.detailed_description:
◆充滿混亂的太空殖民時代

宇宙保安局是維護宇宙治安的官方機構。其中的調查員——幽姿，為了爭取小隊業績、幫助自己的隊長男友，獨自遠離地球、執行危險的任務。

◆豐富的戰鬥內容與戰鬥H演出

龍蛇雜處的太空殖民地裡，有著三大類敵人：人類、觸手，以及機械。36種敵人皆有專屬的戰鬥H表現（部分動作為兼用）。

◇挑選隨機的技能，來構建理想的牌組。共有上百種的技能，等著你解鎖。
◇衣裝破壞、拘束、強制性交——善用這些機制，在逆境中尋找翻盤的可能性！

◆無可避免的墮落道路……？

在面對各種敵人的凌辱、以及黑心商人的調教，幽姿是否能夠堅持住心中對男友的情感？

◇多階段的戰敗H，讓女主角的墮落值不斷增加。
◇6種最終結局，所有結局皆含有NTR要素！

◆主線以外的鑒賞模式

包含有：劇情回憶、自由戰鬥，以及戰鬥H重播模式。

data.short_description: 《Colony City 27λ 》是一款結合了基本卡牌與技能組構築的成人Rougelite遊戲。在故事中挑戰充滿惡意的罪犯、觸手生物和機械敵人。而冒險過程中的戰鬥表現，將會決定最終的結局！
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Colony City 27λ
data.detailed_description:
◆ Chaotic Era of Space Colonization

The Universal Security Bureau is the official institution maintaining cosmic order. Investigator Youzi, in pursuit of team achievements and to aid her captain boyfriend, ventures away from Earth to undertake perilous missions alone.

◆ Rich battle contents and battle sex scenes

In the chaotic space colony, there are three major types of enemies: humans, tentacles, and machines. Each of the 36 types of enemies has its own unique battle sex scenes (some actions are duplicated).

◇Choose from random skills to build your ideal command card deck. There are hundreds of skills waiting for you to unlock.
◇Ripping clothing, bondage, and forced intercourse—make good use of these mechanisms to find the possibility of victory in adversity!

◆ The inevitable path of corruption...?

In the face of the violations from various enemies and the training of malicious businessmen, can Youzi hold on to her feelings for her boyfriend?

◇Sex of defeat on the different stages will increase the heroine’s corruption value.
◇6 types of endings, each containing cockhold elements!

◆ Review mode outside the main storyline

Including: plot recap, free battle, and battle sex replay modes.

data.short_description: Colony City 27λ is an adult Rougelite game that combines simple card and complex skill set. In the story, there are plenty of challenging malevolent criminals, tentacle creatures, and mechanical enemies. Your battle performance during the adventure will determine the final ending!
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
